pi_items.source: Downloaded CoppeliaSim Edu tarball from coppeliarobotics.com
Verified extraction path in install_coppeliasim.sh and presence in downloaded tarball
Verified in setup_task.sh which cleans and prepares this path
Verified presence in downloaded CoppeliaSim Edu tarball

privileged_info_summary: The task requires interacting with the CoppeliaSim Edu installation. The scene file 'pickAndPlaceDemo.ttt' and the ZMQ Remote API path were confirmed to be accurately located within the downloaded CoppeliaSim Edu tarball. The screenshot path is set up explicitly in the setup_task.sh script.
